# Q1 goals and CSS reference

Two themes in one note: (1) Ship the dashboard by end of Q1—clear deadline and deliverable, project-like. (2) CSS grid snippets I keep reusing—reference only. Multi-topic note that triggers the rubric tie-breaker: when both Project and Resource are present, prefer Projects > Areas > Resources > Archives. Expect top_path to favor the project destination when classifier sees the deadline.
